answers.gold_answer: Validation data may be used to choose hyperparameters.
The test set must remain untouched so it provides an unbiased final evaluation.
An imputer must learn its median from training data only.
Temporal leakage uses information from after the prediction timestamp.
Recall measures how many actual positives were found.
Select a probability threshold using validation data and error costs.
An excessive learning rate can cause oscillation or divergence.
Standardization improves conditioning and can make gradient optimization converge more directly.
No. Cross entropy expects raw logits and applies log-softmax internally.
Use evaluation mode to disable training-only behavior and no-grad to stop gradient recording.
TF-IDF is a transparent exact-term retrieval baseline.
Use reciprocal rank fusion to combine lexical and dense rankings without adding raw scores.
Tiny chunks can omit context required to answer correctly.
Choose chunk boundaries using a labelled query set and measured retrieval quality.
No. Data drift alone does not prove that model performance declined.
No. A drift alert should trigger investigation before controlled retraining.
